series_metadata.series_title: Private Investigator Security Guard Section (PISGS) Enforcement Unit Investigation Reports
series_metadata.series_description: This series may contain, but is not limited to: notice of violation; complaint; PISGS Enforcement Investigator summary report; Qualifying Agent, Registrant, Licensee and/or fire-arm bearer applications; photo identifications and social security numbers; correspondence with DPS Legal Services; and all supporting documentation for the investigative case.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current, four years following date case is closed, all appeals have run, and all terms of settlement agreements, if applicable, have been fulfilled. ; Electronic: current, four years following date case is closed, all appeals have run, and all terms of settlement agreements, if applicable, have been fulfilled
